name: Persian
description:
The Classy Cat Pokémon, a Normal type.

#1 - Your pet Persian is keeping you hostage on the couch, completely oblivious that it isn't exactly lapdog-sized.

#2 - A wild Persian has taken to its routine feedings and is waiting on your porch for its fill.

#3 - Blank :)
